prerequisites.value: Improved Unarmed Strike, Psychovore Strike, Psychovore Style, Sense Motive 15 ranks.

description.value: **Benefit:** When you score a critical hit against the creature you are gaining a dodge bonus to AC against from Psychovore Style with your unarmed strike, that target also takes 1 point of Intelligence and Wisdom damage and you gain 2d8 temporary hit points. These temporary hit points last for 1 hour and don’t stack with other temporary hit points you might gain with this feat.
